name: Hostinger Hosting Management API
what_it_does: Affordable web hosting provider with REST API — enabling developers and agencies to manage hosting accounts, domains, email accounts, VPS instances, and WordPress installations via a programmatic API, at highly competitive pricing targeting individual developers, freelancers, and small businesses globally.
use_cases: Managing Hostinger VPS instances via API for automated infrastructure provisioning
Managing Hostinger domain and DNS records via API for domain registration automation
Provisioning Hostinger hosting accounts via API for web agency client onboarding
Managing Hostinger email accounts via API for automated email provisioning workflows
Managing Hostinger WordPress installations via API for managed WordPress deployment
not_for: Enterprise hosting with dedicated infrastructure and SLA guarantees
Teams needing advanced cloud compute (Kubernetes, managed databases)
High-traffic sites requiring dedicated server resources
best_when: A freelancer, web agency, or small business needs affordable shared hosting or VPS with a management API — at pricing that's hard to beat (shared hosting from $2.99/month).
avoid_when: You need enterprise SLAs, advanced cloud compute, compliance certifications, or high-traffic dedicated infrastructure.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Bearer token via Hostinger API credentials. API token from Hostinger developer portal. Bearer token auth. No fine-grained scopes — full account access. No webhooks. REST API for VPS, domains, and billing management. Newer developer API (2023-launched). Documentation at developers.hostinger.com.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; very affordable pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Shared hosting from $2.99/month; VPS from $5.99/month; WordPress hosting from $3.99/month
pricing.notes: Lithuanian company (Kaunas). Founded 2004 as Hostinger International. 29 million+ users in 178 countries. One of the most popular affordable hosting providers globally. hPanel (custom control panel). WordPress hosting leader in value segment. VPS with NVMe SSD. Developer-friendly features: Git, Node.js, Python. Hostinger AI website builder. Recent API launch (2023) — newer API vs established competitors. 24/7 live chat support. GDPR compliant (EU-based). Used by beginners, small businesses, and developers on a budget.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API launched 2023 — newer and evolving. OAuth2 bearer token. No webhooks. GDPR compliant. Rate limits not documented. Primarily shared hosting — limited IaaS capabilities. VPS API enables some automation. Documentation at developers.hostinger.com.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Domain reads idempotent. VPS reads idempotent by ID. Account reads idempotent. VPS creation not idempotent — check by hostname.
known_agent_gotchas: Newer API (2023) — may have gaps in functionality compared to established providers
Shared hosting environments have resource limits — not suitable for compute-intensive automation
No webhooks — must poll for VPS and domain changes
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency operations
hPanel (custom control) vs standard cPanel — some integrations differ

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 bearer token auth. No fine-grained scopes. Shared hosting environment — not suitable for sensitive data requiring isolation. Lithuanian company with EU jurisdiction. Let's Encrypt free SSL included. No compliance certifications beyond GDPR. Cloudflare protection for hPanel.
